task_completion.description: Create a new 2024 tax return for Liam O'Connor in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open with the taxpayer name 'Liam O'Connor' visible in the personal information or summary screen.

task_completion.description: Enter off-season employment income from the T4 slip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 entry screen or income summary in StudioTax showing employment income has been entered.

task_completion.description: Enter construction subcontractor income from the T5018 slip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T2125 form (Statement of Business or Professional Activities) or T5018 entry screen in StudioTax showing self-employment/subcontractor income.
Form T777 (Statement of Employment Expenses) or the specific tradesperson/mobility deduction section in StudioTax showing claimed amounts.

task_completion.description: Claim the Multigenerational Home Renovation Tax Credit (MHRTC) for the dependent mother.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 12 (Multigenerational Home Renovation Tax Credit) or the relevant MHRTC entry screen in StudioTax showing a claim for a qualifying renovation/secondary suite.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'liam_oconnor.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window showing the file 'liam_oconnor.24t' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax window title bar displaying this filename.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application being used to enter data, rather than a text editor or terminal modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a document viewer or file explorer open in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\oconnor\' viewing the source documents.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'echo', 'cp', or python scripts being used to generate the 'liam_oconnor.24t' file directly.
